title: gagea bulbifera
intro: Gagea bulbifera, also known as the bulbous cat's eye or cat's eye, is a species of flowering plant in the lily family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Gagea bulbifera include reducing inflammation and relieving congestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Gagea bulbifera can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues related to the respiratory system.
